answer:
I think Everything Everywhere All at Once has a good shot at becoming a classic. It just came out last year, but I think it has the makings of a movie that will stand the test of time. 

For one thing, it's just so creative and original. The idea of traversing the multiverse and seeing how your life could have been different is such a cool concept. And the way they brought that to life through trippy visuals and seamless editing was really impressive. It felt new and innovative, not like your typical sci-fi movie.

But it's not just about fancy effects - the story and characters are what make it so great. Michelle Yeoh's performance was phenomenal. You feel her character's struggle to connect with her family and find meaning in her mundane life. It's a pretty relatable and human theme, even with all the zany sci-fi stuff.

And it's just so fun! The action sequences are badass, and it doesn't take itself too seriously. There are a lot of laugh-out-loud moments mixed in with the emotional drama. It's really well-balanced in tone. So many movies these days go too far in one direction. Everything Everywhere All at Once finds that sweet spot.

So, with its originality, heart, and fun factor, I think this is a movie that will have a long life. People will want to rewatch it and experience that wild multiverse adventure over and over. It feels fresh while still having a classic quality. That's why I think it will stand the test of time.
title: What is a fairly new movie that you think will stand the test of time? Explain your reasons for thinking that this movie will endure.
extData:
{"answerTemplate":"本题模板:

开场陈述:

开始时提出你认为会经久不衰的一部新电影: "Among the recent films I've watched, I strongly believe that [movie title] will stand the test of time."

电影的独特之处:
讨论这部电影为何特别: "The uniqueness of this film lies in its [discuss aspects like storytelling approach, themes, cinematography, performances]."
强调电影的创新之处: "What sets it apart is [mention specific innovative or groundbreaking elements]."

持久价值的原因:
解释为什么这部电影会持久: "The reasons I believe this movie will endure include [list reasons such as universal themes, emotional depth, cultural impact]."
举例说明电影的影响: "For example, its portrayal of [specific theme or aspect] resonates deeply with [describe the audience or societal impact]."

电影对观众的影响:
讨论这部电影如何影响观众: "This film has had a profound effect on its audience due to [explain the impact, such as inspiring change, offering new perspectives, creating a lasting emotional connection]."
强调电影的普遍吸引力: "Its appeal transcends age, culture, and background, evident in [mention examples of its broad appeal]."

结论:
总结你对这部电影的看法: "In conclusion, [movie title] is not just a cinematic masterpiece of its time but a film that will continue to be celebrated for years to come."
结束语: "Great films not only entertain but also endure, becoming timeless pieces of art, and this movie is a prime example of that.""}
